    94  
    95  // Exec executes a single SQL statement and returns the result.
    96  func (e *Engine) Exec(stmt sql.Stmt) *Result {
    97  	switch s := stmt.(type) {
    98  	case *sql.SelectStmt:
    99  		return e.execSelect(s)
   100  	case *sql.InsertStmt:
   101  		return e.execInsert(s)
   102  	case *sql.UpdateStmt:
   103  		return e.execUpdate(s)
   104  	case *sql.DeleteStmt:
   105  		return e.execDelete(s)
   106  	case *sql.CommitStmt:
   107  		return e.execCommit()
   108  	default:
   109  		return e.execOtherDDL(stmt)
   110  	}
   111  }
   112  
   113  func (e *Engine) execOtherDDL(stmt sql.Stmt) *Result {
   114  	switch s := stmt.(type) {
   115  	case *sql.CreateTableStmt:
   116  		return e.execCreateTable(s)
   117  	case *sql.CreateIndexStmt:
   118  		return e.execCreateIndex(s)
   119  	case *sql.CreateViewStmt:
   120  		return e.execCreateView(s)
   121  	case *sql.CreateTriggerStmt:
   122  		return e.execCreateTrigger(s)
   123  	case *sql.CreateVirtualTableStmt:

   125  	case *sql.DropTableStmt:
   126  		return e.execDropTable(s)
   127  	case *sql.DropIndexStmt:

   129  	case *sql.DropViewStmt:

   131  	case *sql.DropTriggerStmt:
